Physical → digital conversion system

Scan from the table. Decide in seconds.

The card does the work: specials, events, food, drinks, reviews, socials, and return visits. No app. No friction. No buried info.

Owner-facing value

What this solves

Old Town already has a website. This gives them an active customer layer — the thing people use in the moment, while they’re hungry, thirsty, bored, deciding, or ready to share.

01Promotes events without relying only on Facebook scrolling.
02Pushes high-margin menu and drink features at the table.
03Turns reviews, socials, and repeat visits into clear calls-to-action.
04Creates a weekly rhythm customers can recognize and return to.
